title: UNIV Premiership/Season One
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Premiership Season One}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Premiership Season One |tickername=Premiership S1 |shortname=Season 1 |image=UNIV Premiership Season 1 allmode.png |icon=UNIV Premiership Season 1 allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=UNIV Premiership |organizer=UNIV Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/univ.esports |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=INR|prizepool=700000 |country=India |sdate=2026-02-23|edate=2026-02-25 |rulebook= |twitter= |facebook= |instagram=univ.esports |youtube=@UNIV_Esports |web= |discord= }} ==About== * Dec 23, 2025 - Tournament was postponed to 2nd February, 2026 due to unavailability of teams.{{Cite web|url=https://www.instagram.com/p/DSmtf_AkpeG/ |title=Official Announcement 🚨 |author=UNIV Esports |date=2025-12-23}} ===Format=== * '''Pre Quarter Finals:''''' February 2nd - 4th, 2025 ** 64 teams, 3 matchdays. *** 32 qualified teams. *** 32 invited teams. *** Each group will play 6 matches. ** Teams are divided equally into 4 groups of 16. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams from each group (Total 48 teams)}} advance to Quarter Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|Bottom 4 teams from each group}} are eliminated.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' February 9th - 11th, 2025 ** 48 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 16. ** Each group will play 6 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams from each group (Total 24 teams)}} advance to Grand Finals. **{{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' February 16th - 18th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 3 matchdays. ** Teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8. ** Round-robin format. ** Each group will play 12 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} from the Overall Standings advance to the Grand Finals. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|The rest}} are eliminated.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' February 23rd - 25th, 2026 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day). {{box|start|padding=1em}} ====Points Distribution==== {{Points10|toggle=false|killterm=finish}} {{box|break}} ====Map Rotation==== {{MapRotation|EMREME|margin-top=0}} {{box|end}} ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=INR |{{Slot|localprize=300000|{{Opponent|reckoning esports}} }}
